name: Tool Card: Edit
summary: Displays file edit operations with diff view showing old and new content
goals: Render file edit results with a visual diff view
Show the old content, new content, and diff summary

specDetail.description: A specialized tool card for file edit operations. Displays the file path, old content, new content, and a visual diff highlighting additions and deletions.

constraints: Must render a visual diff with added lines highlighted green and removed lines highlighted red
Must show line context around changes (at least 3 lines above and below)
Must provide a toggle between unified and split diff view

acceptanceCriteria.given: a file edit operation result is received
acceptanceCriteria.then: a visual diff is displayed showing the exact changes made to the file

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
